resources:
Emergency Responder Hello blank fragment Continue Crash Detection Drive Smarter, Stay Safer Welcome to your new co-pilot for peace of mind in the road. Let’s get you set up for a safer journey Automatic Crash Detection Using your phone’s sensors, we can detect a potential crash and automatically send for help when you need it most. " Notify Your Loved Ones In case of an incident, your pre-selected emergency contacts will be automatically notified with your location. Enable Location to Detect Accidents In case of an incident, your pre-selected emergency contacts will be automatically notified with your location. Login Enter your email and password to login Enter Email Enter Password Remember me Forgot Password? Reset Password Enter New Password Confirm Password Login Or Login With Register Don’t have an account? Sign Up Register to your account Join to enable instant safety alerts while driving. Emergency Contacts Emergency Responder Enter Name Enter Mobile Number Add More Contacts Already have an account? Login Enter your email, and we\'ll send you a link to reset it securely Safety Dashboard voice Acceleration Phone Stability Stability Trip Time Stable Speed High Members Detail See all Nearby Services Ambulance Police Station SOS Start Traveling Stop Traveling Contants Are you OK? If you don’t respond, we wil automatically notify your emergency contacts. I’m OK / Cancel Alert Send Alert Now Logout
646296022035-5oqgl20lnqmbe56jnlkl9995m14i86fa.apps.googleusercontent.com
Emergency shortcut service for detecting power button presses.
Update Profile Change Password UPDATE
Success Profile Updated Password Updated" Verify your new email Email or password is incorrect. Name must be at least 3 characters long Something went wrong. Please try again.
